title: Shiny Horses
description: Adds the ability to enchant horse armor!
body:
Enchant horse armor with frost walker, feather falling, protection, etc.

This is an unofficial updated version of [Enchantable Horse Armor](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/enchantable-horse-armor) by [tfarecnim](https://www.curseforge.com/members/tfarecnim)
